mapper.insert: INSERT INTO trainer_certification (trainer_id, cert_name, issuing_org, issue_date, expiry_date, cert_file) VALUES (#{trainerId}, #{certName}, #{issuingOrg}, #{issueDate}, #{expiryDate}, #{certFile})
mapper.select: SELECT id, trainer_id AS trainerId, cert_name AS certName, issuing_org AS issuingOrg, issue_date AS issueDate, expiry_date AS expiryDate, cert_file AS certFile, created_at AS createdAt FROM trainer_certification WHERE trainer_id = #{trainerId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
